name: Blood sugar concern
purpose: Organize blood sugar questions and symptoms for clinician review without diagnosing diabetes.
not_allowed: Prescribing insulin or oral glucose drugs
Telling user to skip or double medicines

red_flags.label: confusion or fainting with sugar worry

required_questions.prompt: Any recent sugar reading or lab slip wording?
Thirst, frequent urine, weakness, or blurred vision?

allowed_actions.title: Track symptoms and readings
allowed_actions.instruction: Note readings, meals, and symptoms for clinician review.

allowed_actions.title: Seek urgent care if very unwell
allowed_actions.instruction: Confusion, fainting, or inability to eat/drink needs urgent care.
